text.title: Load Balancer Health Checks Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Database hiccup restarts every pod; cascading outage.
antipattern.root-cause: Liveness probes DB → DB blip → all pods marked unhealthy.
antipattern.fix: Move dependency check to readiness only.

antipattern.symptom: Backend returns 200 even when DB unreachable.
antipattern.fix: Return structured JSON; verify deps before status.

antipattern.symptom: Backends bounce in/out — load skews wildly.
